title: The Silent Office
opening_incident: Emma Clarke, a freelance graphic designer, was found dead at her home office desk, a single blow to the head from a broken bottle.

suspects.name: James Patel
suspects.statement: I was in the kitchen making tea when I heard a thump.
suspects.alibi_claim: I was in the kitchen from 19:30 to 20:15.

suspects.name: Lara Hughes
suspects.statement: I left the room at 19:40 and never returned.
suspects.alibi_claim: I was at the bus stop from 19:45 to 20:05.

suspects.name: Tommy Reed
suspects.statement: I was polishing the monitor when Emma called me.
suspects.alibi_claim: I was at my flat until 20:00.

clues.title: Desk Drawer Disarray
clues.detail: The desk drawer is open and Emma's notebook is missing, but there is no sign of James's tool kit that he always keeps there.

clues.title: Monitor Email Timestamp
clues.detail: Emma's monitor shows an email she sent at 19:45 warning Lara that she would expose their financial dispute.

clues.title: Mug Lipstick Trace
clues.detail: A coffee mug on the desk bears a faint pink lipstick stain matching the shade Tommy wears.

clues.title: Lamp Base Shard
clues.detail: The lamp base is cracked, and a shard of glass matches the broken bottle found beside Emma's head.

clues.title: Stray Post-it Note
clues.detail: A post-it on the desk reads 'Buy more pens' – unrelated to the case.

solution.motive: Financial ruin if Emma exposed their partnership fraud
solution.method: Blunt force with a broken bottle
solution.opportunity: Lara was the only person with access after 19:40
